ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country hosting the match */,
  "neutral" INTEGER /* Indicates if the match was played on neutral ground */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the match took place */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the match took place */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the specific venue where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who attended the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  "assistant_referee1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first assistant referee */,
  "assistant_referee2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second assistant referee */,
  "fourth_official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fourth official */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, postponed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the team represents */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's home venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of the tournament (e.g., Friendly, FIFA World Cup qualification) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the tournament */,
  "current_round" TEXT /* Current round of the tournament (e.g., group stage, knockout stage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "federation_name" TEXT /* Name of the national football federation */,
  "federation_website" TEXT /* URL of the national football federation's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistics pertain to */,
  "possession_home" REAL /* Percentage possession of the home team */,
  "possession_away" REAL /* Percentage possession of the away team */,
  "shots_home" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the home team */,
  "shots_away" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the away team */,
  "fouls_home" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the home team */,
  "fouls_away" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the away team */,
  "corners_home" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the home team */,
  "corners_away" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the away team */,
  "offsides_home" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents by the home team */,
  "offsides_away" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents by the away team */,
  "yellow_cards_home" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the home team */,
  "yellow_cards_away" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the away team */,
  "red_cards_home" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the home team */,
  "red_cards_away" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique log entry identifier */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., login, update match data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Total draws by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals_for - goals_against) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_years" (
  "tournament_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament year record */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the tournament was held */,
  "number_of_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played in the tournament year */,
  "top_scorer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the top scorer in the tournament year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_years_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_years_top_scorer_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_scorer_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the event occurred */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time when the event took place */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, yellow card) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "is_penality" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the event was a penalty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
